fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with one arm"
"Do a gentle squat movement"
"Perform a balanced tai‑chi shift"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Test how the robot walks on uneven terrain"
"Explore balance recovery after a push"
"Simulate realistic joint stiffness and damping"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a simple tool gripper to the hand"
"Attach a virtual sensor to measure foot pressure"
"Experiment with different foot sole materials"
